summary: Iteration 77: Tested OAuth Integrations API and Refund Email Notification features. Backend: 10/11 passed (91%), 1 skipped (no paid orders available for refund test). Frontend: All 7 OAuth provider tiles visible with Connect buttons, status badges, and descriptions. Resend API key input section working.

minor.issue: refund_processed email template was NOT seeded for existing tenants. Had to manually seed it. EmailService.ensure_seeded() only runs when template count is 0, so new templates added to _TEMPLATES don't get added to existing tenants

action_items: Consider adding migration script to seed new email templates for existing tenants (refund_processed not being auto-seeded)
Optional: Update EmailService.ensure_seeded() to check for missing templates rather than only running when count=0
critical_code_review_comments: EmailService.ensure_seeded() only seeds when template count is 0 - new templates won't be added to existing tenants automatically

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All OAuth tiles and Resend section working

seed_data_creation: Manually seeded refund_processed email template for tenant-b-test (UUID: e7301988-7f0f-4b2b-a678-4e37882e385f)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OAuth integrations API fully working. Zoho CRM shows 'Connecting' status because ZOHO_CLIENT_ID is configured. Stripe/GoCardless OAuth credentials not configured (can_connect=false is expected). Refund email template now seeded for tenant-b-test.

verified_features.refund_email_template: PASS - refund_processed template exists (after manual seeding)

verified_features.oauth_tiles_ui: PASS - All 7 OAuth provider tiles visible with Connect buttons, status badges, descriptions
verified_features.resend_api_key_input: PASS - Resend API key input and Save button working

mocked_apis.oauth_providers: OAuth flows are mocked - actual OAuth redirect won't complete without real credentials. Endpoints implemented correctly.
